programme.desc: Matt Miller, Katie Greifeld and Sonali Basak deliver the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: The only daily news programme focused exclusively on technology, innovation and the future of business. Hosted by Ed Ludlow from San Francisco and Caroline Hyde in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: Bloomberg Crypto covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping decentralised finance. Your weekly source for the latest news, analysis and interviews with the most influential stakeholders.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: Bloomberg Markets is focused on bringing you the most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance Of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg: Balance of Power focuses on the politics and policies being shaped by the agenda of President Biden's administration.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Alix Steel, Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell in this must-watch daily program to get an edge on equities, earnings and the economy.

programme.desc: 'S3/E106 - Promises'. Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Sarah And Duck
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Cloud Tower'. A search for shade on a hot day leads Sarah and Duck to discover a fascinating tower.

programme.title: Nelly And Nora
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hot Foot'. When the sand heats up, Nelly and Nora hot foot it around the beach.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Fruit Bat'. Not wanting to go to bed, Bluey tries to dream about being a nocturnal fruit bat so she can stay up all night long and soon finds herself flying through the night sky.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Horsey Ride'. When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Bike'. Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Hotel'. Bluey and Bingo run a crazy 'Hotel' with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

programme.title: Sarah And Duck
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Sound Jumble'. When Sarah hears some interesting music on the radio, she and Duck try to recreate it.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. The animated adventures of friends who bring colour to the world. Colours learn about themselves through adventure and play with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Izaac's Lancashire Chorley Cakes'. Izaac is baking Chorley cakes, a fruity recipe that comes from Lancashire.

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Giant Picture'. Discover how to make a giant picture with powder paint and squeezy bottles. Also, Mister Maker surprises the Mini Makers!

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - Queen Mae-Mae'. Mae-Mae is queen for the day, the rest of the friends can't wait to play in Mae-Mae's new kingdom.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - The Scarlet Squid Clear Out'. Gem enlists another four youngsters to help her reclaim her stolen jewels, and Captain Stinker finally becomes tired of the mess on board the Scarlet Squid.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Spooky Day'. Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Pea's Power Suit'. Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Case of the Cabbage Monster'. Pat-Pat thinks that a cabbage monster must be on the loose when Farmer Tom's cabbages go missing.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E64 - Sticky Gecko'. Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E75 - Mum School'. Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E125 - Whale Watching'. Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E120 - Pavlova'. Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E106 - Promises'. Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S20/E5 - Douche And A Danish'. Giant Douche wants to get out of the presidential race.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S21/E5 - Hummels & Heroin'. Beloved entertainers are being cut down in their prime due to massive overdoses of opiates. Stan is about to be exposed as the source of the illegal drugs.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Flour Child'. After witnessing a woman give birth, Niles decides it's time to practice his parenting skills - on a sack of flour!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - The Candidate'. Frasier and Niles disapprove of Martin endorsing a right-wing political candidate.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - The Botched Language Of Cranes'. When an on-air gaffe tarnishes Frasier's public image, he tries to rebuild it by emceeing a charity event.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Adventures In Paradise Part 1'. Frasier starts dating Madeline Marshall, a businesswoman profiled in 'Seattle' magazine. As their relationship gets more serious, he proposes a weekend trip to Bora Bora.

programme.title: Key & Peele
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Black Ice News'. Sketches include Samuel and Lashawn rejoicing over the benefits of their now-legal marriage, a police detective meeting his new partner, and Lando from 'Star Wars' being followed by a superfan.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - The Pop!'. Darren Harriott narrates a new batch of the world's funniest clips. This week's family-friendly fails bring out-of-control animals, water-sport disasters and calamitous amateur chefs.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - The Clang!'. Darren Harriott narrates a fresh new series of family-friendly fails. Kids compete with grown-ups, and we'll bring you the very best and worst-amateur gymnasts!

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E9 - The Bang!'. Comedian Darren Harriott narrates the funniest clips out there. This week's family-friendly fails include how not to get on a ski lift and some incredible near misses.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - The Smash!'. Comedian Darren Harriott narrates this week's family-friendly fails. We'll bring you our countdown of the biggest show-offs on the internet, plus some of the worst footballers ever.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - The Fart!'. Comedian Darren Harriott narrates this week's family-friendly fails. Expect out-of-control motorists, amateur modelling mishaps, and our guide to walking on ice.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 - Woof!'. Darren Harriott narrates the funniest clips out there. Snowboarders go head-to-head with skiers and we show you how to fall in style. This episode is brought to you by our sound of the week - woof!

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - Ding Dong!'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E14 - The Wack!'. Darren Harriott narrates this week's family-friendly fails - how not to get a promotion at work, and cycling vs running. This episode is brought to you by our sound of the week - the whack!

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - See Dad Run Until He Drops'. Marcus' wife, Alicia, arrives home from Europe surprising everyone with her new look but the Hobbs can't keep up with their friend's new lifestyle!

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - See Dad Nail Valentine's Day'. While acting as room mother, David finds it to be a lot of work, and tries to get out of it, Joe runs away from a scary older student.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - See Dad Rough It'. David takes Joe's scout troop camping to earn his survival badge, and gets help from his old show-crew to complete the tasks.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - See Dad Run Into Marcus' Nephew'. After being forbidden to drive at night, Emily takes Amy's car and goes to a party and must race back to beat David home.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - See Dad Live At Five'. Emily considers dropping out of school to be an intern at a news show, Joe and his friends prepare for a talent show.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Cyrano De-Beckerac'. Linda gets a 'little sister' and learns a lesson about rebellion. John meddles in Reggie's love life.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Linda Quits'. Becker finds Linda hard to replace when she abruptly quits. The gang is puzzled by an old man's odd behaviour.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - My Boyfriend's Back'. Reggie chases a high school fantasy when she reunites with an old crush. Becker is jealous of an old Harvard colleague.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Flour Child'. After witnessing a woman give birth, Niles decides it's time to practice his parenting skills - on a sack of flour!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - The Candidate'. Frasier and Niles disapprove of Martin endorsing a right-wing political candidate.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Everybody Hates Blackie'. The family plans to take a trip down south. While waiting for a bus at the Port Authority, Chris and Julius are conned and lose all their money.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Everybody Hates Bed Stuy'. Chris must come up with a school project for Earth Day, so he decides to collect cans, believing it will be an easy task and something Julius can help him accomplish.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Pilot'. Doug feels the call of the road and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself the motorcycle.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Female Problems'. Carrie is feeling friendless, so when a young woman moves in down the street, Doug encourages Carrie to befriend her.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Fat City'. Doug's in pain, physically and mentally, when he has a very embarrassing accident at work.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - The Botched Language Of Cranes'. When an on-air gaffe tarnishes Frasier's public image, he tries to rebuild it by emceeing a charity event.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Adventures In Paradise Part 1'. Frasier starts dating Madeline Marshall, a businesswoman profiled in 'Seattle' magazine. As their relationship gets more serious, he proposes a weekend trip to Bora Bora.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Hate Thy Neighbour'. Becker returns from the hospital to find his neighbours are noisier than ever and that Dr Carson has fallen for his abrasive attitude. Margaret and Linda have to deal with a slew of temporary doctors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Pain In The Aspirin'. Becker and Liz realise that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Blind Curve'. We find out how Jake became blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend and himself.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Guy Code'. Jeff asks for Audrey's silence about his friend's infidelity, telling her that it's part of the 'guy code.' Adam's pretty, new assistant is incompetent, but he won't fire her.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Bag Ladies'. Russell dates a 'bag lady' and experiences the pitfalls of the relationship. Adam gives into Jennifer's wishes and gets a 'man bag'. Jeff and Audrey try to start rumours about their sex life.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Welcome To Grover's Birthday'. When Dave and Gemma's elaborate plans for Grover's 7th birthday party go awry, Malcolm and Marty come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Welcome To Fight Night'. Calvin reluctantly invites Dave to join his guys' night at home with Malcolm and Marty, while Gemma and Tina take their first girls' trip to Vegas.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Everybody Hates Blackie'. The family plans to take a trip down south. While waiting for a bus at the Port Authority, Chris and Julius are conned and lose all their money.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Everybody Hates Bed Stuy'. Chris must come up with a school project for Earth Day, so he decides to collect cans, believing it will be an easy task and something Julius can help him accomplish.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Everybody Hates Driving'. Chris has to reluctantly train the family's new dog into a security dog after their house is robbed, but he just wants a pet.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Everybody Hates Blackie'. Chris joins the school newspaper's writing staff. His writing skills are not that good so he invents a scandalous story that causes panic.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - The Scream!'. Darren Harriott narrates a fresh batch of the funniest clips out there. This week's fails brings internet challenges gone wrong.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Buyer's Remorse'. Adam and Jennifer decide to purchase an apartment in their building, with Jeff and Audrey agreeing to give them a recommendation to the co-op board.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Pimp My Bride'. Jeff finally buys the car he has always wanted, a Camaro. Meanwhile, Adam and Jennifer have decided on a wedding date.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Welcome To The Re-Rack'. One year after the Johnsons moved next door to the Butlers, Dave is eager to take on a bigger role in Calvin's annual Yardecue and prove how much a part of the community he's become.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Welcome To The Bully'. When Tina decides it's time to make home improvements, Dave volunteers to re-paint the Butler house, violating Calvin's 'man code'.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - White Collar'. When the shift supervisor suddenly dies and Doug gets his job, Carrie is thrilled with the newfound status. Doug, however, forced to join the management ranks, misses the good old days.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Mild Bunch'. Doug plays golf with his new best friend Newsday's Ray Barone.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E10 - Manhattan Project'. When Doug's new trainee turns out to be a beautiful young girl, Doug is sure that Carrie will be jealous. When she's not, he's disappointed.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Blind Curve'. We find out how Jake became blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend and himself.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - The Hypocratic Oath'. Linda orders way too many supplies, turning the office into a chaotic maze. Reggie flirts with a younger classmate and Margaret attends the reading of a will.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S5/E23 - The Power Couple'. Adam and Jennifer agree to go away with Jeff and Audrey. However, the catch is that both couples must sit through a timeshare sales talk in order to get a good deal.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S5/E24 - The Last Of The Red Hat Lovers'. Adam and Jennifer learn that living together and working together aren't the best mix when Adam hires Jennifer to freelance for his company.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Welcome To Logan #2'. When Calvin and Dave's college basketball teams go head to head, Dave surprises the Butlers with tickets to the game and also invites one of his best friends from Michigan.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Welcome To The Camping Trip'. When the Johnsons invite the Butlers to go camping, Dave is taken aback by Calvin's idea of roughing it.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Fat City'. Doug's in pain, physically and mentally, when he has a very embarrassing accident at work.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Cello, Goodbye'. When Deacon and Kelly ask Carrie and Doug to be the godparents of their new baby, Doug is thrilled, Carrie is not.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Ike's Wee Wee'. The boys find out what it means to be circumcised and try to save Ike from that fate.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Conjoined Fetus Lady'. Kyle is terrified because he has to go and see the school nurse who has a scary deformity.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - The Mexican Staring Frog Of Southern Sri Lanka'. The boys have to find out about Vietnam as part of a school assignment and believe a ridiculous story invented by Stan's Uncle Jimbo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - City On The Edge Of Forever'. The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Chef's Salty Chocolate Balls'. When Chef cannot sell his fudge at a visiting film festival, he changes his recipe to chocolate salty balls and invents a song to help sell them.

programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Genie President'. Robin hatches a plan to get rich off pennies, but Starfire believes they are magical.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E9 - Little Elvis'. The Titans team up with Shazam to defeat Mr. Mind.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - The Groover'. Robin takes the Titans on an educational trip.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - The Climb'. Craig's phone gets stuck in the tallest tree in the creek!

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Big Pinchy'. JP leads his friends on a voyage to find the biggest crayfish in the creek.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Kid From 3030'. The kids meet a mysterious kid from the future and try to help him complete his mission.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Power Punchers'. Fed up with losing in video games to his Dad, Craig seeks training in the Creek.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Panda's Sneeze'. Panda bears have a very adorable (and violent!) sneeze, and our Panda is no exception.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Brother Up'. Panda becomes the alpha bear, and he and Grizz have to deal with the consequences of an emotional Panda being the leader of the three Bears.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Tote Life'. A store clerk shames the Bears for asking for plastic bags.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Video Date'. A French woman matches with Panda on an dating website.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Chapter 2: If I Only Had a Wand'. Hedgehog reckons with her mother's disapproval of magic.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Chapter 3: See Bees? Gee! Bees!'. Oscar heads to the Sasquatch Monastery in search of enlightenment.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Chapter 4: Pepper's Funeral'. With help from Pepper, Susie is able to lay a special dream of hers to rest.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chapter 5: The Hits'. Barb and the Alien King take an eventful walk around the island.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Conquest of Cuteness'. King Snuggadoodle and the Huggaboopies invade Finn and Jake's tree house.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Mystery Train'. Finn and Jake find themselves wrapped up a high speed crime puzzle.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Go With Me'. Finn needs a date to go to the movies.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Belly of the Beast'. Finn and Jake must go inside Giant's belly to help him.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E14 - Operation: Hear No Evil'. Mordecai and Rigby want to avoid spoilers of their favourite TV show.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E15 - Space Escape'. The guys have to escape from someone bad.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E16 - New Beds'. The guys get new beds.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E17 - Mordeby and Rigbecai'. Mordecai and Rigby mess about with a teleportation machine, and it isn't hard to imagine how this one goes.

programme.title: Jellystone
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Snowdodio Part 1'. After Shag discovers his Dad's old racing car toys, everyone in town excitedly gets into racing each other with the tiny cars.

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Magic Ball'. Erico subs himself for the team's usual football to boost morale.

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Canyon'. Daniel agrees to let Erico's pet wolf, Canyon, come stay.

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - My Ex-Favorite Player'. Erico discovers Daniel used to be a fan of his archrival, Bolak.

programme.title: LEGO DREAMZzz
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Romancing the Spear'. Set in the past, Oz's first protégés, Beau and Hannah, admit their feelings for each other on a mission to destroy the Nightmare King's sword.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - The Man'. Granny Jojo has brought a boyfriend to her birthday meal and Dad isn't happy about it.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - The Pizza'. The Wattersons complain about their day and order a pizza from Larry...

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S3/E26 - Bottle Episode'. When the Titans get trapped in a giant bottle in their living room, they pass the time by reminiscing.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S3/E27 - Pyramid Scheme'. Beast Boy starts making tons of cash thanks to a pyramid scheme and convinces the other Titans to join in.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Justice League's Next Top Talent Idol Star: Dance Edition Part 2'. Robin is left without a dance crew so Vibe gives him lessons on how to be a world class breakdancer and team player.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Space House Part 1'. The Titans set off on an adventure in space, only to find out they'll be sharing their space house with the DC Superhero Girls.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Space House Part 2'. After Beast Boy steals the power ring and jumps into Zatanna's hat, Green Lantern must deal with being powerless as she and her friends give chase.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: 'S7/E6 - It's Totally a Test'. A test turns real when the Spies encounter Vikings at the Singapore Museum.

programme.title: Supa Strikas
programme.desc: 'S7/E88 - Wolf In Coach's Clothing'. Supa Strikas' rivals take advantage of Coach's break, by sending them a terrible coach!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5 - The Power Of Shrimps'. Aqualad uses shrimps and prime rib to win back Raven.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E16 - Rain on Your Wedding Day'. While facing off with The Brain, Robin tries to teach the other Titans the proper definition of irony.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E17 - Egg Hunt'. Robin still regrets not being able to find an Easter egg when he was a kid, so the Titans head to Gotham to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E30 - Bucket List'. The Titans give Starfire a bucket list of activities to accomplish.

programme.title: Justice League Action
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - The Fatal Fare'. Space Cabbie inadvertantly learns about a great threat to the Justice League when one of his passengers turns out to be Darkseid.

programme.title: Justice League Action
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - Mxy's Mix-Up'. Mxyptlk switches the brains of the Super Hero team.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E65 - Magoo 2.0'. Everybody loves Magoo! This cheerful guy's always happy to lend a helping hand.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E66 - Mr Fixit'. Magoo mistakes Fizz's teleporter for a coffee maker.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E67 - The Gluttons for Punishment'. Magoo mistakes Fizz and Weasel for his old bandmates.

programme.title: Supa Strikas: Rookie Season
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Altered Ego'. Coach drops the team in the Amazon for wild training, Shakes faces a new mystery.

programme.title: Hero Inside
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Darkest Night'. Boastful superhero Black Knight sneaks into a house to acquire a Hero Book but accidentally starts a fire.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - Teen Titans Action Part 1'. The Titans learn that toys from comedy shows don't sell, so they vow to become action heroes.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Teen Titans Action Part 2'. Having grown tired of their new action lifestyle, the Titans try to break their deal with Toy Master, even enlisting help from the Justice League.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Give Pizza A Chance'. Rivals Buster and Plucky decide to throw an epic pizza party and are shocked to find out they're actually getting along.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Boys vs Girls'. The Titans organise a competition where boys and girls face each other.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Body Adventure'. When Cyborg is sick Robin insists on shrinking to cell size to fight Cyborg's infection himself.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Road Trip'. A road trip in Cyborg's T-Car is really fun - for a while.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - The Best Robin'. Robin calls on another team when the others are too lazy.

programme.title: LEGO DREAMZzz
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Wake That Dreamer'. While Mateo searches for his lost hourglass, his doppelganger, MadTeo, infiltrates Castle Nocturnia and charms everyone as the final trial approaches.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - La Larva De Amor'. The gang agrees to babysit Silkie but then loses him, meanwhile Silkie has a telenovela adventure south of the border.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Beast Boy on a Shelf'. Santa Claus forces Beast Boy to become a spy and report on the Titans' naughty behaviour.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - That's What's Up'. Beast Boy heads back east to visit his family, the Doom Patrol, and they decide to throw a clambake to celebrate.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Crab Shenanigans'. Beast Boy, Negative Girl, and Robotman start hanging out with some punk crabs but soon discover the crabs are up to no good.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E70 - Maggie Magoo'. Magoo mistakes a bear on the loose for his niece.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E71 - Magoo's Best Friend'. Magoo mistakes Fizz for an old school friend.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E72 - Welcome to Translovenia'. Magoo mistakes Weasel for a vampire.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - The Skull'. Gumball and Darwin befriend Clayton who is a compulsive liar and begins contaminating them with lies.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Frenemy'. When the coolest girl in school befriends the Powerpuff Girls, she charms them into becoming her accomplices in a series of adventurous crimes.

programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Bubbles of the Opera'. When Bubbles gets a bad school photo, it sends her into an existential tailspin of darkness.

programme.title: Ben 10

programme.title: Ben 10

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Newsline Biz
programme.desc: Reporting the latest business, finance and economic news with added analysis from studio guests.

programme.title: Activate Your Japanese
programme.desc: Learn how to make the most of your Japanese skills - watch our drama that features useful communication strategies, our snappy videos about onomatopoeia, and our documentaries on 'senpai' in Japan.

programme.title: Bosai: Be Prepared
programme.desc: Winter Fire Precautions: The fact that Japan is dry in winter greatly increases the risk of fire - we learn tips for preventing fires occurring and how to respond effectively when a fire breaks out.

programme.title: Hello! NHK World-Japan
programme.desc: This time we introduce 'Japan Delish', which showcases the variation of Japanese food culture which evolved in a unique way - we demonstrate this by showing curry rice and Chinese dumplings.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Riverside Sawmill: Workers at a sawmill use the latest tools and honed skills to prepare the building blocks of Edo life, long, narrow beams, bamboo stems, and leftover wood stacked high as buildings.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The Jomon period dates roughly from 13,000 to 300 B.C. - we examine various aspects of Jomon society with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: Dogu.

programme.title: Japan From Above: Up Close
programme.desc: This programme takes you on an aerial journey across 21st-century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: Go superstar Ichiriki Ryo has upended traditional thinking about the board game in his native Japan and, in the process, delivered the country's first world title in 19 years.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Newsline In Depth
programme.desc: Introducing a colourful variety of feature stories, including reports on daily life from locations throughout Japan as well as other parts of Asia and around the world.

programme.title: Journeys In Japan
programme.desc: Actor Charles Glover discovers a hidden village of thatched roofs right in the city of Kobe - he delights in the architecture, the charming people, and even a rural kabuki performance.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Shiraishi Yuriko is working to popularise surimi, a type of processed fish paste, in Africa - she talks about how her efforts are helping empower African women and improve their status in society.

programme.title: Dining With The Chef
programme.desc: Chef Saito adds orange to namasu salad and fragrant sesame to grilled squid in a kaiseki cooking class - the dishes are presented in the traditional hassun style.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Newsline In Depth
programme.desc: Introducing a colourful variety of feature stories, including reports on daily life from locations throughout Japan as well as other parts of Asia and around the world.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours

programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Avalanches'. We tend to think of disasters as inevitable - but often Mother Nature gives us vital clues which we foolishly ignore or overlook. This episode looks at avalanches and what we can learn about why they strike.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Cape Town'. Andrew Zimmern samples the cuisine of Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city is also known for seafood.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Mauritius'. From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavourful fusions of Mauritius.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S49/E6 - Hangry Baskets: Late Night'. The chefs get baskets inspired by late-night cravings. In round one, the chefs must create a dish using frozen pizza, meatballs and maitake mushrooms.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Trendsetting Turkey Day'. The seven remaining bakers make baked brie and jam mini pies. Later, they use a prepared ingredient to make a crowd-pleasing Thanksgiving dessert.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Clarksville'. Noah Cappe and chefs Jet Tila and Tiffani Faison explore the food scene in Clarksville, Tennessee. There, they sample pizza, pasta, BBQ, and cheesecake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S37/E3 - Mediterranean & Mofongo'. In Florida, Guy Fieri finds a funky spot that puts a Mediterranean spin on burgers. Then, he visits a local gem dishing out Puerto Rican specialties.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E6 - Casino Royale XL: Grand Finale'. The champions are back, and they're chasing a jackpot that starts at $25,000! They face shocking ingredient in their appetiser basket.

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Sweets For Barbie'. Jesse Palmer celebrates Warner Bros. Pictures' movie event, Barbie! He challenges the bakers to make desserts inspired by Barbie's signature colour, pink!

programme.title: Holiday Wars
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Ugly Sweater Party'. Host Jeff Mauro challenges the five remaining teams to create a woodland creature who is throwing an ugly sweater party for all their forest friends.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S23/E12 - Pour On Some Love'. The gang share delicious recipes for a romantic Valentine's Day meal. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his roasted potatoes with warm blue cheese sauce.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S49/E7 - Cooked With Care!'. Four nurses who love to cook show off their culinary skills! In the appetiser round, the competitors are handed canned bacon, mahi mahi fillets and kohlrabi.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Winter Wonderland'. Casey Webb challenges three teams of bakers to create fantasy snow globe cakes that capture Christmas magic. They use ice sculpture to enhance the glitz!

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Mrs Claus' Night Off'. Three teams of master festive bakers and their ice sculptors compete to show off a new side of Mrs. Claus in out-of-this-world cake designs and displays.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Christmas Eve'. The remaining baking teams and their ice sculptors create the ultimate night before Christmas cake display featuring Santa Claus, for the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Gettin' Gifty with It'. The six bakers are tasked with reinventing panettone. Then they're challenged to create a decorated cupcake mosaic inspired by a pair of holiday pyjamas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S32/E13 - Chicken And Briskets'. Guy visits a spot that's serving up hearty home cooking with a healthy spin. And, he checks out a Mexican joint that's located inside a gas station.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S33/E1 - Takeout: Worldwide Delivery'. Guy Fieri combines cooking at home with great restaurant food when four series veterans send ingredients and join him via video chat to cook the recipes.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S50/E18 - Deep-Fried Deliciousness'. The competing chefs must use the fryers to create crunchy, decadent dishes. First up, the appetiser basket contains something spicy and a strange drink.

programme.title: Holiday Wars
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Holiday Parade'. The six remaining teams face off as Jeff Mauro tasks them with creating one of the biggest holiday traditions: a parade float!

programme.title: Elf On The Shelf: Sweet Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Season's Meetings'. At the Scout Elves' Enchanted Cottage, the six teams create an edible shelf for their own Scout Elf and memory-filled snow globe showpieces.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - New Haven'. Noah Cappe, Jet Tila and Tiffani Faison visit the top restaurants in New Haven, Connecticut. There, they sample burgers, hot honey pizza, hot chicken and empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S37/E4 - A World Of Meat'. Guy Fieri seeks out meaty mashups! First up in Boise, Idaho, a Russian joint serves light-out lamb, and then a Pakistani spot cooks up flavourful goat.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E8 - Good Ole Creole Cookin''. Four chefs who specialise in comforting and complex Creole cuisine get creative with their basket ingredients, which include alligator meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E7 - Meaty To Meatless'. Guy Fieri digs into dishes with and without meat, like righteous rabbit in Alabama, meatless chicken in Nebraska and gangster Greek in Connecticut.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E8 - Wrapped, Pied And Fried'. Guy Fieri has it wrapped, pied and fried with craveable carnitas in Mobile, Alabama, elevated pizza in Cody, Wyoming, and brisket in Omaha, Nebraska.

programme.title: Outchef'd
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Risotto Royale'. Software consultant Tommy Ranucci must prove he's great with grains when he faces off against his childhood hero, Chef Andrew Zimmern.

programme.title: Outchef'd
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Hog Wild'. Home cook Luke aims to walk away with $5,000 when he goes head-to-head against chef Maneet Chauhan in a battle with pork as the star ingredient.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E11 - Gluten For Punishment'. Something fried in the appetizer basket is a bit of a head-scratcher for the chefs, and in the next round they pull some curious fusion tacos from the basket.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Selena + Alta Adams'. Selena Gomez feels the pressure at Alta, Keith Corbin's California restaurant. Later, she makes a fried fish dish for Atla's toughest critic.

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Bring 4th The Sweets'. Jesse Palmer challenges the three finalists to make amusement park treats. Then, the bakers serve sparkler-studded 4th of July parade float cakes for the title!

programme.title: Holiday Wars
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Time Travelin' Santa'. Host Jeff Mauro challenges the remaining four teams to go back in time to create a Santa from a specific period in history.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E13 - From Chicken To Chiles'. Guy Fieri finds all kinds of unexpected flavour with next-level sandwiches in Cleveland with Chef Michael Symon. And in NJ, a joint is amping up bar bites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E14 - Cruisin' Coast To Coast'. Guy Fieri digs into flavour coast to coast, starting at a taco joint in Indio, California, with a next level quesadilla-taco-au jus mashup.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Yule Be Merry'. The 10 bakers team up for boozy desserts! Then they take on five different styles of yule log cakes in 10 different flavour combinations.

programme.title: In The Kitchen With Abner And Amanda
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Guava Croissants And Frittata'. Abner and Amanda plan a brunch menu with flavours inspired by their travels. Abner makes croissants, and adds guava, a popular Cuban filling.

programme.title: Supertruckers
programme.desc: 'S3/E4'. John has a tough job taking a 60-tonne crane into the heart of Edinburgh, and Steve and Sam race to take a dockside container-stacker from Sunderland for shipping to Sweden.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Termite Tempest'. Derek saves a 1966 Pontiac Tempest with a rare overhead-camshaft six-cylinder engine, working magic on the upholstery and converting the OHC to EFI.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Mini Moke'. Designed as an off-road army car the Mini Moke soon became a civilian cult classic, so this should be a winner. But can the lads agree on anything and get the job done?

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Dragon's Teeth'. Darrell focuses on a multi-million-dollar wreck tied to Sir Francis Drake. He and his team race to locate a treacherous area identified on the map as Dragon's Teeth.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: 'S3/E27 - Strength In Numbers'. The family prepares to close down Browntown following Ami's diagnosis. Meanwhile, Bear, Bird and Rain leave the California heat to return to Alaska.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: 'S9/E1 - 'Public Enemy' '33 Hot Road'. Bryan Fuller has been working on a '33 hot rod for over ten years. He shows off some amazing metal fabrication to finish the headers.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S13/E1 - Hammers/Swiss Cheese/Roller Skates'. How are hammers, Swiss cheese, roller skates and coloured pencils made? Find out as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Unchained Reaction
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Fire And Ice'. Judges Adam and Jamie of Mythbusters challenge a team of rocket scientists and a family of special effects artists to build a Fire and Ice themed multi-step machine.

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Launch'. In Norway, workers prepare for the delivery of the super tug's hull pieces. Back in South Korea, the Tangier is about to take to the open sea for the very first time.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Cab Over Custom'. Bill and the team try to outdo themselves with a radical redesign of 1950 Ford F5 COE, starting with a unique bed. The shop starts remaking a '69 Corvette Stingray.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - David Meet Goliath'. Mouthy leadership, fired-up tempers, and high-pressure situations dominate a tension-filled night when South Carolina race against the St. Louis crew.

programme.title: Unchained Reaction
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Take Flight'. Adam and Jamie pit a team of engineers against a group of artists to build multi-step machines with this week's theme: flight. Will the machines get off of the ground?

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Launch'. In Norway, workers prepare for the delivery of the super tug's hull pieces. Back in South Korea, the Tangier is about to take to the open sea for the very first time.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Dragon's Teeth'. Darrell focuses on a multi-million-dollar wreck tied to Sir Francis Drake. He and his team race to locate a treacherous area identified on the map as Dragon's Teeth.

programme.title: Driving Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - British Tractor Pullers'. Tractor-pulling is the most powerful motorsport in the world. Elvis has less than two weeks to use his F1 skills to build a tractor capable of racing.

programme.title: Supertruckers
programme.desc: 'S3/E4'. John has a tough job taking a 60-tonne crane into the heart of Edinburgh, and Steve and Sam race to take a dockside container-stacker from Sunderland for shipping to Sweden.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - We Got Bad Blood'. For the second heat, Kye Kelley and his NOLA racers take on Birdman and his team from Texas. As the rivals battle, car trouble stops one team in its tracks.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Hotwired Tow Truck'. Derek heads to a scrapyard to find a retired tow truck he can use around the shop, but this 1979 Dodge D300 proves reluctant to go anywhere.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Range Rover'. Mike buys a bargain Range Rover P38 and Edd sets about mending it. They head to the wilds of Exmoor to give the car a final test drive before searching for a buyer.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Cab Over Custom Part 2'. The client requests a last-minute Cummins diesel engine swap on the year-long 1950 Ford F5 COE build. A twisted graphic completes a 2001 Ford F350.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - The Chemist'. A former Escobar chemist claims to know where $30 million in cash and gold is buried. Chris and Ramon investigate a new property with secret tunnels.

programme.title: Secret Space Escapes
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Fire On The Mir'. Astronauts and cosmonauts battle a life-threatening fire and tackle an out-of-control cargo ship on the Russian space station, MIR.

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Maiden Voyage'. Finally complete, the Tangier has left port to begin her maiden voyage. On the other side of the world, the super tug team race against the clock to finish the build.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Island Of Fortune'. Darrell and the team head to a mysterious island where they discover valuable clues that lead them closer in the hunt to a 500-year-old shipwreck.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: 'S3/E28 - Weight Of The Wolfpack'. As Ami awaits treatment options, the kids set to join Matt in Alaska packing up Browntown. But an accidental explosion leaving Matt injured causes a setback.

programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Cab Over Custom Part 2'. The client requests a last-minute Cummins diesel engine swap on the year-long 1950 Ford F5 COE build. A twisted graphic completes a 2001 Ford F350.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Moonlight Run'. DreamWorks the 24-hour channel dedicated to kids and family entertainment.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Why Rhino Charges'. There was a time when Rhino didn't charge and he couldn't see very well at all.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Why Caterpillar Is Never In A Hurry'. You see Caterpillar was never in a hurry. When all the animals were racing around Tinga Tinga getting ready for the Best-dressed parade.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Why Lion Roars'. There was a time when Lion had lost his roar. Crocodile was snapping at all the animals in the waterhole and Lion opened his big mouth, but nothing came out!

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Why Zebra Has Stripes'. Zebra was once very easy to spot in Tinga Tinga as he was bright white all over. This very annoying as all he wanted was to be left alone to munch on yummy grass.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - The Case Of The Snow Mystery'. It's Christmas Day and Noddy's got a new snowglobe. He wishes it would snow outside but Big Ears tells him that it has never snowed in Toyland.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Case Of The Wonky Toys'. All the toys in Toyland are visiting Fuse's workshop for a toy check but something is wrong! Toys are fine before the check and wonky after!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - The Case Of The Tug Of War Rope'. It's the annual Tug-of-War game in Daredale between the Pirates and the Ninjas. As the game starts the tug-of-war rope snaps.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - The Case Of The Runaway Animals'. All the farm animals have run away from the farm and are causing chaos in Toy Green. Noddy launches his investigation and discovers that the farm gate was left open.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Jungle Jiggles'. All of the animals have their own way of dancing, except Zebby, who says she is too shy to dance. Or is she?

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Raa Raa's Nap Time Story'. Topsy reads Zebby a nap-time story, but when Raa Raa does the accompanying noises Zebby finds she can't get to sleep.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Go Bananas'. Raa Raa and the other animals have picked loads of bananas for Ooo Ooo's banana party, but can they get them back to her house in time?

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - New Tail'. D-Structs loses his wrecking ball tail and wants to prove he's still dangerous, but when he gets stuck the crew must decide if they will save him.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Ottos'. When a meteor crashes into the Wrenchtools' home, the Dinotrux take them to safe ground, little do they know D-Structs is planning a giant attack.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - A Game of Fists'. When Po and eventually the kids finally make it on the Riverboat, they discover old friends, new enemies, and perplexing cargo.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...

programme.title: Righting Wrongs

programme.title: Playboy Cops

programme.title: Endless Battle
programme.desc: Two brothers, one a drug lord and the other a police officer, clash in an endless battle between good and evil in a drug cartel's turf war.

programme.title: Eastern Condors

programme.title: My Heart is That Eternal Rose

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 13'. Elani verloor 'n baie dierbare stryd by die werk en kan nie die druk van haar daaglikse beroep hanteer nie. Veronica en Sollie se ma's kom kuier om 'n huwelik te probeer red.

programme.title: Sê Jou Sê
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 of 12'. Wat gebeur as jy in 'n publieke plek val? Wie is aanspreeklik daarvoor? Ons hoor 'n paar hartseer stories.

programme.title: Die Boodskap: Vir Jou Lewensreis

programme.title: Vrystaatbewoners

programme.title: ontbytSAKE
programme.desc: 'S11/E35 of 52'. Ons ateljeegas is een van Suid-Afrika se eie Hollywoodsterre, Neil Sandilands en ons SAKEfokus is in Middelburg, Oos-Kaap, en ons wys julle ook besighede in Pretoria en die res van die land.

programme.title: My Naam Is Farah
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 of 80'. Tahir wys vir Farah die besigheid wat hy oorneem van Bekir. Daar lê hy sy hart bloot vir haar. Kaan trek sy klag teen Mehmet terug.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E175 of 239'. 'n Wonderlike geleentheid kom oor Aiden se pad, terwyl Nazeem sy bes doen om Emir uit die rooi te kry. Lee-Ann gee Debbie se pistool vir haar terug.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E89 of 140'. Louis is op 'n missie met Tanne. Hazel is in 'n slegte toestand. Erica balanseer haar tyd tussen Louis, Patty, Ronnie en Christine. Jasmine maak oop oor die plaas se finansiële sake.

programme.title: Klaskamer 10
programme.desc: 'S8/E97 of 105'. In wiskunde behandel Martin graad 10 wiskunde konsepte. Werner kyk, tydens die FW deel van die les, na die fisiese wetenskappe konsepte wat in graad 10 bemeester moet word.

programme.title: Super Rugby
programme.desc: 'S11/E46 of 47'. Kenners kyk na die jongste ontwikkelinge in die rugby-wêreld. Ateljeegaste neem ook deel aan besprekings en beantwoord kykers se inbelvrae.

programme.title: Met 'n Huppel In Die Stap
programme.desc: 'S12/E9 of 26'. Ons stel hierdie week ondersoek in na mense se reaksie op die dood van 'n geliefde troeteldier. Daar word gesels met veeartse en mense wat hulle dierevriende verloor het.

programme.title: Lui Maar Op Belinda
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 of 13'. Dit is 'n gejaag teen tyd soos Nicol vir Annetjie 'n groot vraag wil vra en Dirkie vir Nicol iets wil sê en Annetjie se middagete geheim word uiteindelik op die lappe gebring.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E132 of 260'. Naomi word sieker, en Conrad wil hê Annelize moet terugkom werk toe. Liam maak 'n finale besluit, en Karen ontdek iets wat haar bekommer. Delia maak 'n besluit oor haar toekoms.

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 of 208'. Jacques en Zelda probeer Pam, Meghan en Bybie red. Charity vra vir Anja raad. Zelda en Gys bevind hulself in 'n interessante posisie.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E176 of 239'. Lee-Ann moet weer by Clayton 'n draai gaan maak. Kate en Aiden vang vir Justin met 'n slap riem, terwyl Bianca nie gelukkig is met Nazeem se nuwe plan nie.

programme.title: eNuus
programme.desc: 'S15/E248 of 335'. Daaglikse nuushooftrekke, sporthoogtepunte en weervooruitskouing in Afrikaans.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E90 of 140'. Hazel vertel vir Jasmine wat aangaan. Shakiel voel skuldig omdat hy vir Amber moet jok. Veronique se gedenkdiens word gehou en Patty is diep geraak en dankbaar.

programme.title: My Naam Is Farah
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 of 80'. Farah probeer Gonul ompraat om nie met Kaan te trou nie. Bade besoek Mehmet en dit loop sleg af. Chaos breek uit in Tahir se restaurant wanneer iemand 'n wapen uithaal.

programme.title: Kyk Wie Praat
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 of 13'. Wat is die kortste maand van die jaar? Dink die klitse hulle sal 'n goeie sportkaptein maak? Hierdie is maar net 'n paar van die vrae wat ons hierdie week vir die klas vra.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E132 of 260'. Naomi word sieker, en Conrad wil hê Annelize moet terugkom werk toe. Liam maak 'n finale besluit, en Karen ontdek iets wat haar bekommer. Delia maak 'n besluit oor haar toekoms.

programme.title: Suidooster

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 of 208'. Jacques en Zelda probeer Pam, Meghan en Bybie red. Charity vra vir Anja raad. Zelda en Gys bevind hulself in 'n interessante posisie.

programme.title: Kwêla
programme.desc: 'S26/E35 of 43'. Ons gesels met 'n voormalige recce, en 'n 98-jarige beeldhouer. Ons besoek 'n familie houtmeubelbesigheid en hoor De Wet Vermeulen se wonderwerkverhaal.

programme.title: Nêrens, Noord-Kaap
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 of 13'. Ronnie gaan plaas toe om die stukke te probeer optel. Andries en Pa Lourens berei voor vir hulle reis na Nederland.

programme.title: In Gesprek
programme.desc: 'S9/E23 of 31'. Ons bespreek die einde van gedrukte Afrikaanse koerante, hoe stewig staan die grondwet, en daar is 'n skikking oor BELA.

programme.title: Prontuit
programme.desc: 'S11/E6 of 13'. Ons gesels oor menopouse - van simptome tot stigmas. Dr Julienne Fenwick praat oor bio-identiese hormone en holistiese behandeling en Melanie Verwoerd vertel ons van haar radikale histerektomie.

programme.title: Musiekvideo's
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 2'. Musiekvideo's vir elke smaak.

programme.title: Die Boodskap: Vir Jou Lewensreis

programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Selena Gomez lend their voices to this supernatural animation. Count Dracula runs a hotel for monsters, but his problems begin when a human boy decides to stay.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Ben Stiller and a star-studded cast lend their voices to this great animation. Four zoo animals escape and unwittingly find themselves far away in the wildness of Madagascar.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: A sequel to the Oscar-winning superhero animation. Miles Morales jets across the Multiverse, where he meets a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: Javier Bardem stars in this charming musical comedy based on a children's book series. A family moves into a new house, not realising that the house has a living, singing crocodile.

programme.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
programme.desc: Tony Shalhoub returns as Adrian Monk in this enjoyable movie sequel to the beloved show. Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic.

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: A heartwarming, funny underdog tale led by Woody Harrelson and Kaitlin Olson. A former minor league basketball coach is ordered to train a team of players with learning disabilities.

programme.title: SuperSport Variety
programme.desc: AM. Look forward to a variety of live and delayed sports programmes from around the globe, which include golf, rugby, motorsport, watersport, boxing, tennis and football.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves returns as the lethal assassin in this non-stop action thriller. John Wick comes out of retirement to help an old associate, pitting him against deadly killers.

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Willem Dafoe drives this psychological thriller as an art thief who, after his heist goes wrong, gets trapped in a penthouse. He must use all his cunning and ingenuity to survive.

programme.title: The Last Voyage Of The Demeter
programme.desc: A terrifying story based on a chapter from Bram Stoker's 'Dracula' novel. A cargo ship sets sail from Carpathia to London, but soon the trip turns into a fight for survival.

programme.title: Fear
programme.desc: A chilling horror movie. A much-needed getaway and a celebration weekend turns into a nightmare due to the contagious airborne threat.

programme.title: The Outpost
programme.desc: Scott Eastwood and Orlando Bloom take on overwhelming odds in this war movie. A small team of US soldiers battle against hundreds of Taliban fighters in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: A gripping survival thriller. A camping trip turns into a fight for survival after two kids witness a horrific murder in the wild.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: After his father dies, a millionaire playboy inherits his father's company. He decides to become a crime fighter as the masked superhero, The Green Hornet.

programme.title: Into The Storm
programme.desc: It's man versus nature in this thrilling disaster film. A group of storm chasers and the residents of a small town try and survive a tornado superstorm.
Adam Driver fights for survival in this action-packed sci-fi thriller. After a catastrophic crash on a mysterious, unknown planet, an astronaut quickly discovers he's not alone.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Liam Neeson, Diane Kruger, and Jessica Lange star in this period crime thriller. In late 1930s Bay City, a down-on-his-luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a heiress.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Tyrese Gibson join forces to bring a Miami drug lord to justice in the first sequel to the Hollywood thrill ride. Expect hot cars and plenty of action.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury Of The Gods
programme.desc: Zachary Levi returns as Shazam in this hilarious sequel. While Billy and his foster siblings learn how to juggle their superhero lives, they face a vengeful trio of ancient gods.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jason Statham returns to battle more giant sharks and other creatures. A research team explores the ocean's deepest depths, but their quest soon turns into a battle for survival.

programme.title: Black Demon
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat thrilling sci-fi. An idyllic family vacation becomes a nightmare when they get stranded on a crumbling rig in Baja and encounter a vengeful megalodon shark.

programme.title: Medieval
programme.desc: Starring Ben Foster and Michael Caine, this is an epic take on the true story of Jan Žižka, one of Czech history's greatest warriors who is said to never have lost a battle.

programme.title: The Standoff At Sparrow Creek
programme.desc: A nail-biting, captivating thriller. A former cop-turned-militia man investigates a shooting at a police funeral.

programme.title: The Corruptor
programme.desc: East meets West in this film starring Yun-Fat Chow and Mark Wahlberg. Two New York officers and team up to take down a Chinese Triad operation.

programme.title: Furry Fortune
programme.desc: A heartwarming family film about twin siblings whose pet dog magically sheds money. When their neighbour kidnaps the money-making canine, they work together to save their pet.

programme.title: Skelly
programme.desc: A coming-of-age drama. After his grandfather's passing, a young boy is sent on a journey by his father to understand death while putting together the annual haunted house.

programme.title: Christmas In The Caribbean
programme.desc: A charming Christmas film. After being jilted at the altar, Rachel and her two bridesmaids go to her planned Christmas Caribbean honeymoon, where love blossoms.

programme.title: Epic Tails
programme.desc: An adventure animation about friendship, bravery, and teamwork. Assisted by ageing hero Jason and the Argonauts, a mouse and a cat try to save their Greek city from the wrath of Poseidon.

programme.title: Katak: The Brave Beluga
programme.desc: A fun kids' animation that shows you do not have to be big to be brave. A young beluga whale embarks on a perilous journey to fulfil his ailing grandmother's last wish.

programme.title: The Amazing Panda Adventure
programme.desc: A touching live-action animal adventure. A young boy helps his zoologist father save a panda cub captured by poachers from a Chinese wildlife preserve.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out...
programme.desc: 'Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out Of The Shadows'. The four mutant brothers return for a thrilling sequel. Once again, they face Shredder, but this time, he has interdimensional help.

programme.title: Nanny Mcphee And The Big Bang
programme.desc: Oscar winner Emma Thompson writes and stars in this fun family film. A mysterious nanny arrives to help a struggling mom with her kids and the farm while their father is at war.

programme.title: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy returns in the nutty sequel to the slapstick comedy about how the unexpected consequences of a DNA altering formula lead to the professor's alter ego wreaking havoc.

programme.title: Anacondas: Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: A chilling snake horror. A research team travel to the jungle to get a rare flower called the Blood Orchid, but giant man-eating snakes stand in their way.

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: Kevin Hart delivers a livewire performance in this buddy-cop comedy about a security guard trying to prove himself to his girlfriend's top cop brother (Ice Cube).

programme.title: Meet The Blacks
programme.desc: Mike Epps stars in this spoof comedy. A Chicago family move into a wealthy Beverly Hills neighbourhood, where, unbeknownst to them, it's 'purge' night.

programme.title: Zeros And Ones
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke takes on a dual role in this gripping war thriller. An American soldier stationed in Rome must stop an imminent terrorist threat to the Vatican.

programme.title: Princess At War
programme.desc: The battle of who will perform the Eyewali rituals and become the head princess becomes a war between two princesses and their kingdom.

programme.title: Monica's Error
programme.desc: A married man, struggling with years of childlessness, makes a mistake by accepting an invitation from his ex-girlfriend, leading to potential complications in his marriage.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hell And High Water'. Ben is running out of food, but sudden snow gives hope of tracking wild game, while a promising dig site prompts Boyce to haul in his mining equipment.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Monster In The Mine'. Dave, Cindy and K.D. investigate a historic mansion after reports of a ghostly intruder. They uncover a history of murder and are threatened by spirit voices.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Shadow Of Doubt'. A terrified couple calls the team to their home after the wife awoke to a dark figure choking her. Will this unassuming house reveal what is haunting Butte?

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Family Legacy'. The three build teams kick off their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. Adam and his family begin building a Family Legacy cabin in the Wrangell Mountains.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Frozen Highway'. Three teams continue their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. Adam and his family stake out the area for their Family Legacy cabin.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Fight For McCarthy'. Neil is on the brink of reopening the Motherlode mine for tourism, but a new arrival puts Neil's empire at risk. Jeremy begins a new venture to grow his family farm.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Devil's Bargain'. Neil seeks help from McCarthy's unlikeliest resident to pursue his mine tour project. Tim gets a reminder of home when Mark pays him a surprise visit.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Weird Science'. In an effort to salvage Cloud Island, Doug leads the miners across a fractured ice sheet to collect samples. In Ilulissat, Eric's scientific methods are wearing thin.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Eqi Gold'. The seven miners are about to reach their tipping point. Even though Saqqaq was a success, Cloud Island was a failure and their faith in Eric's strategy is losing steam.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot'. The guys dismantle a barn built by Lincoln's uncle and then build an Appalachian dogtrot barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Rescuing a Massive Barn and Finishing the Lincoln Cabin'. The guys rescue a massive dogtrot-style barn in Indiana, and then they visit the nearly-completed Lincoln cabin.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Closing In On The Fortune'. The team finds evidence of a route used to transport the fortune. Plus, a Jesuit artefact may provide the most critical information on treasure's location.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Hot On The Trail'. The team uses explosives to blast their way to the treasure. Shawn and Javier unearth the expedition's largest find yet, confirming they are on the right track.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Bigfoot of Cook Inlet Water Stalker'. The AMS investigate a water-based Bigfoot, meaning the team must use speedboats, kayaks, and water traps to capture this elusive creature.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Bigfoot of Matanuska Klondike Crawler'. The AMS team returns to Zone 9 of the Alaska Triangle, to investigate an aggressive Bigfoot responsible for slaughtering livestock.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S15/E6 - Tennis Titan, Brooklyn Brownstone Murder And Nuclear Moon'. Don Wildman investigates a Titanic survivor, a crime of passion and a plot to attack the moon.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: 'S14/E11 - Moonshiner Spirits'. TAPS visit a New Jersey mansion where the mysterious death of its original owner hangs over the property. What ghostly activity will this team uncover?

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S11/E11 - Rage'. Amy and Steve travel to Lynchburg, Ohio, where a former mixed martial arts fighter is being attacked by a shadowy entity she can't seem to fight.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S11/E5 - Lost Souls'. Steve and Amy travel to New London, Wisconsin, to help a desperate family. The parents fear one of their children summoned a demonic entity through a spirit board.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - The Body Box'. Amy, Adam and Chip investigate an old hospital in Tennessee. Once a beacon of hope, the abandoned building is now rumoured to be haunted by a dog-like entity.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Back On Earth'. Jack shows his parents odd videos of suspected UFOs, giant cryptids and ghosts. Plus, Ozzy is convinced his current home is haunted - is he starting to believe?
